description_long: This object is a detailed bonsai tree with a thick, gnarled trunk and numerous branches adorned with small, pink blossoms, evoking the appearance of a cherry blossom tree. The trunk is planted in a shallow, rectangular black pot filled with light-colored pebbles, which sits atop a wooden slatted stand. The stand is placed on a white, irregularly shaped base that resembles a stylized stone or tile platform. The branches are densely packed and spread outward, creating a lush canopy of flowers. The overall craftsmanship highlights the intricate structure of the trunk and the delicate, clustered arrangement of the blossoms. The object exudes a sense of careful cultivation and artistry, typical of traditional bonsai displays.
description: A lush, pink-blossomed bonsai tree with a twisted trunk in a black rectangular pot, set on a wooden stand atop a white base. The branches are densely packed, creating a vibrant and detailed miniature tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of pink blossoms and the thick, twisted trunk, with the pot and wooden stand clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the canopy and the layered arrangement of branches, with the pot and stand seen from an angle.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the trunk's curvature and the back branches, with the pot and stand partially obscured by the foliage.
description_view_3: Back view showing the reverse side of the trunk and branches, with the pot and stand visible from behind and the white base more prominent.
attribute_pot_type: Rectangular, shallow black pot, likely ceramic, with a simple, unadorned finish and no visible decorative patterns.
attribute_trunk_curvature: Sharply twisted trunk with pronounced bends and movement, resembling the informal upright (Moyogi) bonsai style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely arranged in a radial and somewhat layered pattern, with many small offshoots creating a full, rounded canopy.
attribute_leaf_density: Dense, with blossoms and foliage closely packed throughout the canopy, giving a lush and vibrant appearance.
